snippet.description:
Presenting the Full Video Song "Jaan Se Guzarte Hain", from the film #DhurandharTheRevenge.

Credits: 
Jio Studios Presents
A B62 Studios Production

An Aditya Dhar Film
DHURANDHAR THE REVENGE

Written, Directed and Produced by: Aditya Dhar

Music - Shashwat Sachdev, Nusrat Fateh Ali Khan
Singer - Khan Saab, Shashwat Sachdev
Lyrics - Nusrat Fateh Ali Khan
Mixed and Mastered by Akash Shravan
Zitar: Mehtab Ali Niazi
Music Label - T-Series

#JaanSeGuzarteHain 

Lyrics:

Dil Pe Zakham Dil Pe Zakhm Khaate Hain  
Jaan Se Guzarte Hain 
Dil Pe Zakhm Khaate Hain  Jaan Se Guzarte Hain 
Dil Pe Zakhm Khaate Hain  Jaan Se Guzarte Hain 
Dil Pe Zakhm Khaate Hain  
Jaan Se Guzarte Hain 
 
Jurm Sirf Itna Hai  
Jurm Sirf Itna Hai  
Unko Pyaar Karte Hain 
 
Aitbaar Badhta Hai  
Aur Bhi Mohabbat Ka Aitbaar Badhta Hai  
Aur Bhi Mohabbat Ka 
Jab Woh Ajnabi Bankar  
Paas Se Guzarte Hain 
 
Dil Pe Zakhm Khaate Hain  Jaan Se Guzarte Hain 
Dil Pe Zakhm Khaate Hain  
Jaan Se Guzarte Hain 
 
Wo jo pher kar nazrein Paas se guzarte hain 
Wo jo pher kar nazrein 
Paas se guzarte hain 
E gham-e-zamana hum 
Tujhko Yaad karte hain 
 
Dil Pe Zakhm Khaate Hain  Jaan Se Guzarte Hain 
Dil Pe Zakhm Khaate Hain  Jaan Se Guzarte Hain 
Dil Pe Zakhm Khaate Hain  
Jaan Se Guzarte Hain 
 
Jurm Sirf Itna Hai  
Jurm Sirf Itna Hai  
Unko Pyaar Karte Hain

snippet.title: CHATORI BAHU 2 I аӨҡаӨҹаҘӢаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ¬аӨ№аҘӮ 2 I OFFICIAL TRAILER I ANJANA SINGH I NEW BHOJPURI MOVIE 2026
snippet.description:
#anjanasingh #prashantsingh #ladomadhesiya #jyotimishra #Chatoribahu #anjanasinghfanpage #fortune #bhojpurimovie #bhojpuri #trailer #trending

IVY ENTERTAINMENT PRESENTS IN ASSOCIATION WITH 3R FILMS AND PRODUCTION 

Brand Partner вҖ“ Fortune refined soyabean oil

аҘһаӨҝаӨІаҘҚаӨ® - 

аӨ•аӨІаӨҫаӨ•аӨҫаӨ° - аӨ…аӨӮаӨңаӨЁаӨҫ  аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№ , аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨ¶аӨҫаӨӮаӨӨ  аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№ , аӨІаӨҫаӨЎаҘӢ аӨ®аӨ§аҘҮаӨёаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ  ,аӨңаҘҚаӨҜаҘӢаӨӨаӨҝ  аӨ®аӨҝаӨ¶аҘҚаӨ°аӨҫ  , аӨёаҘӢаӨЁаӨҫаӨІаҘҖ  аӨ®аӨҝаӨ¶аҘҚаӨ°аӨҫ , аӨ…аӨ®аӨ°  аӨ•аҘҒаӨ¶ , аӨ…аӨ®аӨҝаӨӨ аӨ¶аҘҒаӨ•аҘҚаӨІаӨҫ , аӨ°аҘӮаӨӘаӨҫ  аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№ ,аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨ•аӨҫаӨ¶  аӨңаҘҲаӨё , аӨёаҘҖ.аӨӘаҘҖ аӨӯаӨҹаҘҚаӨҹ  , аӨёаӨӘаӨЁаӨҫ  аӨҜаӨҫаӨҰаӨө  .

аӨ¬аӨҫаӨІ аӨ•аӨІаӨҫаӨ•аӨҫаӨ° - аӨўаҘӢаӨІаҘӮ , аӨҡаӨҫаӨ№аӨӨ

аӨ•аӨҫаӨӮаӨёаҘҮаӨӘаҘҚаӨҹ - аӨёаӨӮаӨҰаҘҖаӨӘ аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№

аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаҘҮаӨ¶аӨ• вҖ“ аӨҮаӨ¶аҘҚаӨӨаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫаҘҳ аӨ¶аҘҮаӨ– аӨ¬аӨӮаӨҹаҘҖ


аӨІаҘҮаӨ–аӨ• - аӨ…аӨ°аӨ¬аӨҝаӨӮаӨҰ аӨӨаӨҝаӨөаӨҫаӨ°аҘҖ


аӨёаӨӮаӨ—аҘҖаӨӨаӨ•аӨҫаӨ°-  аӨ“аӨ® аӨқаӨҫ

                                 аӨ—аҘҖаӨӨаӨ•аӨҫаӨ° - аӨ…аӨ°аӨ¬аӨҝаӨӮаӨҰ аӨӨаӨҝаӨөаӨҫаӨ°аҘҖ


аӨёаӨӮаӨ•аӨІаӨЁ - аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аҘҖаӨӨаӨ® аӨЁаӨҫаӨҜаӨ•

аӨӣаӨҫаӨҜаӨҫаӨӮаӨ•аӨЁ - аӨ№аӨ°аҘҖаӨ¶ аӨёаӨҫаӨөаӨӮаӨӨ  
 
аӨ•аҘӢаӨ°аӨҝаӨҜаҘӢаӨ—аҘҚаӨ°аӨҫаӨ«аӨ° - аӨёаҘӢаӨЁаҘӮ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аҘҖаӨӨаӨ®

аӨӘаҘӢаӨёаҘҚаӨҹ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аҘӢаӨЎаӨ•аҘҚаӨ¶аӨЁ- аӨ‘аӨҜ аӨөаӨҝаҘӣаӨЁ аӨёаҘҚаӨҹаҘӮаӨЎаӨҝаӨҜаҘӢ (аӨЁаӨҫаӨ—аҘҮаӨӮаӨҰаҘҚаӨ° аӨҜаӨҫаӨҰаӨө )

аӨҶаӨ°аҘҚаӨҹ аӨЎаӨҫаӨҜаӨ°аҘҮаӨ•аҘҚаӨҹаӨ° - аӨ¶аӨҝаӨөаӨҫ аӨңаӨҜаӨёаӨөаӨҫаӨІ

аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨ®аӨҫаӨӨаӨҫ - аӨёаӨӮаӨҰаҘҖаӨӘ аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№, аӨҮаӨ¶аҘҚаӨӨаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫаҘҳ аӨ¶аҘҲаҘҷ аӨ¬аӨӮаӨҹаҘҖ

 аӨ®аҘҚаӨҜаҘӮаӨңаӨҝаӨ• вҖ“ IVY MUSIC
аӨёаҘ…аӨҹаҘ…аӨІаӨҫаӨҮаӨҹ аӨ”аӨ° аӨЎаӨҝаӨңаӨҝаӨҹаӨІ аӨӘаӨҫаӨ°аҘҚаӨҹаӨЁаӨ° - B4U аӨӯаҘӢаӨңаӨӘаҘҒаӨ°аҘҖ




B4U аӨ•аҘҚаӨ°аӨҝаӨҸаӨҹаӨҝаӨө аӨҹаҘҖаӨ® вҖ“ 

аӨ®аӨҫаӨ°аҘҒаӨҰ аӨ¶аӨ°аҘҚаӨ®аӨҫ, аӨЁаҘҮаӨ№аӨҫ аӨүаӨӘаӨҫаӨ§аҘҚаӨҜаӨҫ, аӨөаӨҝаӨ¶аӨҫаӨІ аӨҜаӨҫаӨҰаӨө


B4U аӨІаҘҖаӨ—аӨІ - аӨёаӨӮаӨҰаҘҖаӨӘ аӨ°аӨҫаӨЈаӨҫ , аӨӨаҘғаӨ·аҘҚаӨЈаӨҫ аӨӘаӨҹаҘҮаӨІ , аӨӘаҘӮаӨЁаӨ® аӨ¶аӨҝаӨӮаӨҰаҘҮ , аӨҶаӨ•аӨҫаӨӮаӨ•аҘҚаӨ·аӨҫ аӨөаӨҫаӨ•аҘӢаӨЎаҘҮ вҖ“ аӨ®аҘӢаӨ°аҘҮ

IVY вҖ“ аӨҸаӨӮаӨҹаӨ°аӨҹаҘҮаӨЁаӨ®аҘҮаӨӮаӨҹ -  аӨ«аӨҫаӨҮаӨЁаҘҮаӨӮаӨё  

аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨҰаҘҖаӨӘ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨҰаӨҫаӨ—аӨҫ , аӨңаӨҝаӨЁаҘҮаӨІаҘҮ аӨ®аҘҲаӨёаҘҚаӨ•аӨ°аҘҮаӨЁаҘҚаӨ№аӨҫаӨё , аӨөаӨҝаӨӘаҘҒаӨІ аӨңаҘҲаӨЁ , аӨЁаӨҝаӨөаҘғаӨӨаҘҚаӨӨаӨҝ аӨӘаӨҫаӨҹаӨҝаӨІ, аӨ№аӨҝаӨ®аӨҫаӨӮаӨ¶аҘҒ аӨҡаҘҢаӨ§аӨ°аҘҖ

B4U - аӨ«аӨҫаӨҮаӨЁаҘҮаӨӮаӨё

аӨёаӨӮаӨӨаҘӢаӨ· аӨ—аӨ°аҘҚаӨ— , аӨ°аӨөаӨҝаӨӮаӨҰаӨ° аӨёаӨҫаӨІаҘҚаӨөаҘҖ , аӨ¶аҘҲаӨІаҘҮаӨ¶ аӨӨаҘҚаӨ°аӨҝаӨөаҘҮаӨҰаҘҖ








                 FILM- CHATORI BAHU 2 
 

STARCAST-ANJANA SINGH, PRASHANT SINGH, LADO MADHESIYA ,JYOTI MISHRA , SONALI MISHRA, AMAR KUSH,AMIT SHUKLA, RUPA SINGH,PRAKSH JAIS, C.P BHATT , SAPNA YADAV .
CHILD ARTIST - DHOLU , CHAHHAT

snippet.title: Bhooth Bangla -Official Trailer| Akshay Kumar, Tabu, Paresh, Wamiqa, Priyadarshan |In Cinemas 16 Apr
snippet.description:
Welcome to Bhooth Bangla. Yahan na toh log normal hain... Aur upar se Bangla bhi paranormal hai. 
Enter at your own risk рҹ§ҹвҖҚвҷҖпёҸ

#BhoothBanglaTrailer out now

#BhoothBangla, paid previews begin in theatres 16th April 2026, 9 PM onwards рҹ‘»

When London-returned Arjun Acharya arrives in the sleepy town of Mangalpur to host his sisterвҖҷs wedding at his newly inherited ancestral palace, he finds himself caught in a whirlwind of terrified locals, bizarre ghostly happenings, and hilarious chaosвҖ”until he begins uncovering the shocking truth behind the palaceвҖҷs centuries-old legend.

Balaji Telefilms Ltd. in association with Cape Of Good Films present
Bhooth Bangla

Starring: Akshay Kumar, Paresh Rawal, Rajpal Yadav, Tabu, Wamiqa Gabbi, Jisshu Sengupta, Manoj Joshi, Mithila Palkar, Asrani Ji, Rajesh Sharma 
Directed by: Priyadarshan
Produced by: Akshay Kumar, Shobha Kapoor, Ektaa R. Kapoor
Co-producer: Vimal Doshi, Faara Sheikh, Vedant Vikaas Baali
Group CEO & CFO (BTL): Sanjay Dwivedi
Director of Photography: Divakar Mani

Screenplay by: Priyadarshan, Rohan Shankar, Abilash Nair
Dialogues by: Rohan Shankar

Lyrics: Yitendra Mishra & Kumaar
Co-Director: Abilash Nair

snippet.description:
The madness is backвҖҰ and this time, itвҖҷs bigger, louder, and full-on #BawaalFamilyEntertainer

Ginny and Sunny return to a new phase of love, marriage, and family chaos. But when expectations clash, secrets unfold, and relatives get a little too involvedвҖҰ things spiral into a rollercoaster of emotions, laughter, and full desi drama.
Get ready for a sequel where love gets messier, families get louder, and every moment is pure entertainment.

snippet.title: Sonawane Vahini рҹҳӮ | Khandeshi Bhauji Varhadi Bhauji рҹ”Ҙ | Ahirani Comedy Song 2026 #sachinkumavat
snippet.description:
Sonawane Vahini рҹҳӮ | Khandeshi Bhauji Varhadi Bhauji рҹ”Ҙ | Ahirani Comedy Song 2026 #sachinkumavat  

https://youtu.be/WcjAWrHYUws

рҹ”Ҙ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨёаҘҚаӨӨаҘҒаӨӨ аӨҶаӨ№аҘҮ аӨҸаӨ•аӨҰаӨ® аӨ§аӨ®аӨҫаӨІ аӨ…аӨ№аӨҝаӨ°аӨҫаӨЈаҘҖ аӨ®аӨ°аӨҫаӨ аҘҖ аӨ•аҘүаӨ®аҘҮаӨЎаҘҖ аӨёаҘүаӨӮаӨ— рҹҳҚ
вҖңSonawane Vahini, Khandeshi Bhauji, Varhadi BhaujiвҖқ аӨҜаӨҫ аӨ—аӨҫаӨЈаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨӨ аӨӨаҘҒаӨ®аҘҚаӨ№аӨҫаӨІаӨҫ аӨӘаӨҫаӨ№аӨҫаӨҜаӨІаӨҫ аӨ®аӨҝаӨіаҘҮаӨІ аӨӯаӨЁаҘҚаӨЁаӨҫаӨҹ аӨ•аҘүаӨ®аҘҮаӨЎаҘҖ, аӨ•аӨӮаӨ§аҘҮаӨ¶аҘҖ аӨёаҘҚаӨҹаӨҫаӨҲаӨІ аӨҶаӨЈаӨҝ аӨ«аҘҒаӨІ аӨҸаӨӮаӨҹаӨ°аӨҹаҘҮаӨЁаӨ®аҘҮаӨӮаӨҹ рҹҺү

рҹ‘ү аӨңаӨ° аӨӨаҘҒаӨ®аҘҚаӨ№аӨҫаӨІаӨҫ аӨ•аӨӮаӨ§аҘҮаӨ¶аҘҖ аӨ—аӨҫаӨЈаҘҖ, аӨ…аӨ№аӨҝаӨ°аӨҫаӨЈаҘҖ аӨёаҘүаӨӮаӨ—аҘҚаӨё аӨҶаӨЈаӨҝ аӨ®аӨ°аӨҫаӨ аҘҖ аӨ•аҘүаӨ®аҘҮаӨЎаҘҖ аӨөаҘҚаӨ№аӨҝаӨЎаӨҝаӨ“ аӨҶаӨөаӨЎаӨӨ аӨ…аӨёаӨӨаҘҖаӨІ аӨӨаӨ° аӨ№аӨҫ аӨөаҘҚаӨ№аӨҝаӨЎаӨҝаӨ“ аӨЁаӨ•аҘҚаӨ•аҘҖ аӨ¬аӨҳаӨҫ рҹ’Ҝ

рҹ’Ҙ аӨөаҘҚаӨ№аӨҝаӨЎаӨҝаӨ“ аӨҶаӨөаӨЎаӨІаӨҫ аӨӨаӨ° LIKE рҹ‘Қ SHARE рҹ”Ғ COMMENT рҹ’¬ аӨҶаӨЈаӨҝ SUBSCRIBE рҹ”” аӨ•аӨ°аӨҫаӨҜаӨІаӨҫ аӨөаӨҝаӨёаӨ°аҘӮ аӨЁаӨ•аӨҫ

#FromOnPrime, New Season, April 20

X: https://x.com/PrimeVideoIN

ABOUT PRIME VIDEO
Prime Video is a one-stop entertainment destination offering customers a vast collection of premium programming in one application available across several devices. On Prime Video, customers can find their favourite Indian and international original series, movies, TV shows, and more, across multiple languages вҖ“ including Indian-produced Original series like Mirzapur, Farzi, Panchayat, The Family Man, Dhootha, Jubilee, Dahaad, Made in Heaven, Suzhal вҖ“ The Vortex, Inspector Rishi, Poacher, Indian Police Force, Paatal Lok, Rainbow Rishta, Wedding.con; Original movies like Maja Ma, Ammu, Mast Mein Rehne Ka; popular global Originals like Citadel, The Lord of The Rings: The Rings of Power, Fallout, Reacher, The Boys, The Wheel of Time, Road House, The Idea of You; some of the biggest post-theatrical films; direct-to-service films such as Shershaah, Soorarai Pottru, Sardar Udham, Bawaal, Gehraiyaan, Jai Bhim, Jalsa, Sherni, Narappa, Sarpatta Parambarai, Kuruthi, Joji, Malik, Pippa, HOME, Sharmajee Ki Beti, and many more of such titles. Additionally, Prime VideoвҖҷs video entertainment marketplace, offers customers programming from partners such as Lionsgate Play, Discovery+ Crunchyroll, BBC Player, Sony Pictures вҖ“ Stream, MGM+, FanCode, Chaupal, Manorama Max, Eros Now, Hoichoi, Anime Times, to name a few, via Prime Video add-on-subscriptions, as well as the option to rent movies, regardless of whether customers have a Prime membership or not. Customers can also go behind the scenes of their favorite movies and series with exclusive X-Ray access. Prime Video is one benefit among many that provides savings, convenience, and entertainment as part of the Prime membership. For more info visit www.amazon.com/primevideo.

snippet.description:
Hindi Gana рҹҘҖ Sadabahar Song рҹ’“ аӨ№аӨҝаӨӮаӨҰаҘҖ аӨ—аӨҫаӨЁаҘҮ вқЈпёҸ Purane Gane Mp3 рҹ’• Filmi Gaane | Durga Boss 
Hindi Gana рҹҘҖ Sadabahar Song рҹ’“ аӨ№аӨҝаӨӮаӨҰаҘҖ аӨ—аӨҫаӨЁаҘҮ вқЈпёҸ Purane Gane Mp3 рҹ’• Filmi Gaane | Durga Boss 

вңЁ 90вҖҷs аӨ№аӨҝаӨӮаӨҰаҘҖ аӨёаӨҰаӨҫаӨ¬аӨ№аӨҫаӨ° аӨ—аӨҫаӨЁаҘҮ | Evergreen Hindi Songs Collection вңЁ

аӨҮаӨё аӨөаҘҖаӨЎаӨҝаӨҜаҘӢ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨёаҘҒаӨЁаӨҝаӨҸ 90 аӨ•аҘҮ аӨҰаӨ¶аӨ• аӨ•аҘҮ аӨёаӨ¬аӨёаҘҮ аӨӘаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨ°аҘҮ, аӨ°аҘӢаӨ®аӨҫаӨӮаӨҹаӨҝаӨ• аӨ”аӨ° аӨёаҘҒаӨӘаӨ°аӨ№аӨҝаӨҹ аӨ№аӨҝаӨӮаӨҰаҘҖ аӨ—аӨҫаӨЁаҘҮ рҹҺ¶
аӨҜаҘҮ аӨ—аӨҫаӨЁаҘҮ аӨҶаӨң аӨӯаҘҖ аӨҰаӨҝаӨІ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨӣаҘӮ аӨңаӨҫаӨӨаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮ аӨ”аӨ° аӨӘаҘҒаӨ°аӨҫаӨЁаҘҖ аӨҜаӨҫаӨҰаҘӢаӨӮ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨӨаӨҫаӨңаӨјаӨҫ аӨ•аӨ° аӨҰаҘҮаӨӨаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮ вқӨпёҸ

вң”пёҸ 90вҖҷs аӨ•аҘҮ аӨёаӨҰаӨҫаӨ¬аӨ№аӨҫаӨ° аӨ—аӨҫаӨЁаҘҮ
вң”пёҸ аӨӘаҘҒаӨ°аӨҫаӨЁаҘҮ аӨ°аҘӢаӨ®аӨҫаӨӮаӨҹаӨҝаӨ• аӨ№аӨҝаӨӮаӨҰаҘҖ аӨёаҘүаӨЁаҘҚаӨ—

23.аӨ№аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨӨаҘҒаӨ®аӨёаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҒаӨҶ аӨ№аҘҲ аӨӘаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨ°
24.аӨҰаӨҝаӨІ аӨІаӨ—аӨҫ аӨІаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ®аҘҲаӨӮаӨЁаҘҮ аӨӨаҘҒаӨ®аӨёаҘҮ
25.аӨҰаҘҮаӨ–аӨЁаҘҮ аӨөаӨҫаӨІаҘӢаӨӮ аӨЁаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҚаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ•аҘҚаӨҜаӨҫ
26.аӨ—аҘӢаӨ°аҘҮ аӨ—аҘӢаӨ°аҘҮ аӨ®аҘҒаӨ–аӨЎаӨјаҘҮ аӨӘаҘҮ аӨ•аӨҫаӨІаӨҫ
27.аӨҶаӨң аӨ•аӨ№аӨЁаӨҫ аӨңаӨ°аҘӮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲ
28.аӨҰаӨҝаӨІ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨҰаӨ°аҘҚаӨҰ аӨёаӨҫ аӨңаӨ—аӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ
29.аӨ•аӨ№аҘӢ аӨЁаӨҫ аӨӘаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨ° аӨ№аҘҲ аӨ•аӨ№аҘӢ
30.аӨҹаӨҝаӨӘ аӨҹаӨҝаӨӘ аӨ¬аӨ°аӨёаӨҫ аӨӘаӨҫаӨЁаҘҖ
31.аӨӨаҘҒаӨ®аӨёаҘҮ аӨ®аӨҝаӨІаӨЁаҘҮ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨҰаӨҝаӨІ аӨ•аӨ°аӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ
32.аӨҸаӨ• аӨёаӨЁаӨ® аӨҡаӨҫаӨ№аӨҝаӨҸ аӨҶаӨ¶аӨҝаӨ•аҘҖ аӨ•аҘҮ 
33.аӨ®аҘҲаӨӮаӨЁаҘҮ аӨӘаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨ° аӨӨаҘҒаӨ®аҘҚаӨ№аҘҖ аӨёаҘҮ аӨ•аӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ аӨ®аҘҲаӨЁаҘҮ
34.аӨ№аӨҰ аӨёаҘҮ аӨңаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨҰаӨҫ аӨёаӨЁаӨ® аӨӨаҘҒаӨқаҘҮ аӨӘаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨ° 
35.аӨ№аӨ®аӨёаҘҮ аӨӘаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨ° аӨ•аӨ°аҘӢ аӨ№аӨ®аӨёаҘҮ аӨӘаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨ° аӨ•аӨ°аҘӢ
36.аӨңаӨҫаӨЁаҘҮаӨ®аӨЁ аӨҡаҘҒаӨӘаӨ•аҘҮ аӨҡаҘҒаӨӘаӨ•аҘҮ аӨёаӨҫаӨ°аҘҖ аӨҰаҘҒаӨЁаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ
37.аӨҰаҘҖаӨөаӨҫаӨЁаӨҫ аӨ®аҘҲаӨӮ аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨҰаҘҖаӨөаӨҫаӨЁаӨҫ, аӨҰаҘҖаӨөаӨҫаӨЁаӨҫ
38.аӨ№аӨ° аӨҰаӨҝаӨІ аӨңаҘӢ аӨӘаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨ° аӨ•аӨ°аҘҮаӨ—аӨҫ аӨӨаҘҒаӨқаҘҮ
39.аӨҡаӨӮаӨҰаӨҫ аӨёаӨҝаӨӨаӨҫаӨ°аҘҮ аӨ¬аӨҝаӨӮаӨҰаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨӨаҘҒаӨ®аҘҚаӨ№аӨҫаӨ°аҘҖ
40.аӨңаӨ¬ аӨӨаӨ• аӨ°аӨ№аҘҮаӨ—аӨҫ аӨёаҘҖаӨЁаҘҮ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨҰаӨҝаӨІ 
41.аӨ•аҘҢаӨЁ аӨ№аҘҲ аӨңаҘӢ аӨёаӨӘаӨЁаҘӢаӨӮ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨҶаӨҜаӨҫ
42.аӨҶаӨӨаҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲ аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨҜаӨҫаӨҰ аӨ¬аӨ№аҘҒаӨӨ аӨҶаӨӨаҘҖ 
43.аӨҶаӨҸаӨ—аҘҖ аӨ№аӨ° аӨӘаӨІ аӨӨаҘҒаӨқаҘҮ аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨҜаӨҫаӨҰ
44.аӨҡаҘӢаӨ°аҘҖ аӨҡаҘӢаӨ°аҘҖ аӨҰаӨҝаӨІ аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨҡаҘҒаӨ°аӨҫаӨҸаӨӮаӨ—аҘҮ
45.аӨҗаӨёаҘҖ аӨҰаҘҖаӨөаӨҫаӨЁаӨ—аҘҖ аӨҰаҘҮаӨ–аҘҖ аӨЁаӨ№аҘҖаӨӮ аӨ•аӨ№аҘҖаӨӮ

hi.title: аӨ®аҘҚаӨҜаҘӮаӨҹаӨҝаӨЁаҘҖ (2026) аӨ•аӨҫ аӨҶаӨ§аӨҝаӨ•аӨҫаӨ°аӨҝаӨ• аӨҹаҘҚаӨ°аҘҮаӨІаӨ° - аӨңаҘҮаӨёаӨЁ аӨёаҘҚаӨҹаҘҲаӨҘаӨ®
hi.description:
аӨ®аҘҚаӨҜаҘӮаӨҹаӨҝаӨЁаҘҖ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ, аӨ…аӨӘаӨЁаҘҮ аӨ…аӨ°аӨ¬аӨӘаӨӨаӨҝ аӨ¬аҘүаӨё аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ№аӨӨаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫ аӨҰаҘҮаӨ–аӨЁаҘҮ аӨ”аӨ° аӨ–аҘҒаӨҰ аӨүаӨё аӨ…аӨӘаӨ°аӨҫаӨ§ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаӨҝаӨҸ аӨ«аӨӮаӨёаӨҫаӨҸ аӨңаӨҫаӨЁаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨҰ, аӨ•аҘӢаӨІ аӨ°аҘҖаӨЎ (аӨңаҘҮаӨёаӨЁ аӨёаҘҚаӨҹаҘҲаӨҘаӨ®) аӨ…аӨӘаӨЁаҘҮ аӨ¬аҘүаӨё аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ®аҘҢаӨӨ аӨ•аӨҫ аӨ¬аӨҰаӨІаӨҫ аӨІаҘҮаӨЁаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаӨҝаӨҸ аӨҸаӨ• аӨ®аӨҫаӨІаӨөаӨҫаӨ№аӨ• аӨңаӨ№аӨҫаӨң аӨӘаӨ° аӨёаӨөаӨҫаӨ° аӨ№аҘӢ аӨңаӨҫаӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ, аӨІаҘҮаӨ•аӨҝаӨЁ аӨӨаӨӯаҘҖ аӨүаӨёаҘҮ аӨҸаӨ• аӨ…аӨӮаӨӨаӨ°аӨ°аӨҫаӨ·аҘҚаӨҹаҘҚаӨ°аҘҖаӨҜ аӨёаӨҫаӨңаӨҝаӨ¶ аӨ•аӨҫ аӨӘаӨӨаӨҫ аӨҡаӨІаӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ

аӨІаӨҫаӨҜаӨӮаӨёаӨ—аҘҮаӨҹ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨёаҘҚаӨӨаҘҒаӨӨ аӨ•аӨ°аӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ, аӨ®аҘҲаӨЎ аӨ°аӨҝаӨөаӨ° аӨӘаӨҝаӨ•аҘҚаӨҡаӨ°аҘҚаӨё аӨ”аӨ° аӨӘаӨӮаӨҡ аӨӘаҘҲаӨІаҘҮаӨё аӨ•аӨҫ аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨ®аӨҫаӨЈаҘӨ

аӨЁаӨөаҘҖаӨЁаӨӨаӨ® аӨ®аҘӮаӨөаҘҖ аӨҹаҘҚаӨ°аҘҮаӨІаӨ°, аӨ•аҘҚаӨІаӨҝаӨӘ аӨ”аӨ° аӨ…аӨЁаҘҚаӨҜ аӨңаӨҫаӨЁаӨ•аӨҫаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаӨҝаӨҸ аӨІаӨҫаӨҜаӨӮаӨёаӨ—аҘҮаӨҹ аӨҜаҘӮаӨҹаҘҚаӨҜаҘӮаӨ¬ аӨҡаҘҲаӨЁаӨІ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨёаӨ¬аҘҚаӨёаӨ•аҘҚаӨ°аӨҫаӨҮаӨ¬ аӨ•аӨ°аҘҮаӨӮ:

en.title: Saving My X Girlfriend in Minecraft SMP
en.description:
How I Saved My X Girlfriend in Her Minecraft SMP

In this video, my girlfriend gets lost in our Minecraft SMP, and I go on a crazy adventure to find her. Along the way, there are intense fights, challenges, and unexpected moments. In the end, I finally rescue my ex-girlfriendвҖҰ but the journey wasnвҖҷt easy!

Lyrics:
Mahari ebbe sharafat dekhi sai fetange jis din bigdange , 
R mahrete k mahare saaye te bhi log ye darkai likdenge, 
Hum na hawabaaj r bande Or na chalchalan k gande r na karne faddu dhande baat sda syani rakhange 
Are dc n mardi mohar chladya aslya ka yo jor 
Bnadya bairi ka jo mor vo bande khani rakhange, 
Konya rhva kise t darkai rakha bandukhadi n bharkai, r jo sedhya uski karkai kunba ghaani rakhange... 

R jo khele khel jo loga n ve aapa khtam bnadyange, thamne to reel bnai se appa film bnadyange, 
Janta dekh k hoja bauli, barsai jb pital ki goli kheli jagi khoon ki holi pistal taani rakhange, 
Are dc n mardi mohar chladya aslya ka yo jor 
Bnadya bairi ka jo mor vo bande khani rakhange, 
Konya rhva kise t darkai rakha bandukhadi n bharkai, r jo sedhya uski karkai kunba ghaani rakhange... 

Are lehrande asle dikhenge r dikhenge sareaam bhagat, 
Bdhabad goli chalengi r chalengi sareaam bhagat, 
Re wepon khas mangau mota naam yamraj ka dhardu jhota kadhle goli khoon ek lota mot ki rani rakhenge, 
Are dc n mardi mohar chladya aslya ka yo jor 

Bnadya bairi ka jo mor vo bande khani rakhange, 
Konya rhva kise t darkai rakha bandukhadi n bharkai, r jo sedhya uski karkai kunba ghaani rakhange...

Lyrics:
Mahari ebbe sharafat dekhi sai fetange jis din bigdange , 
R mahrete k mahare saaye te bhi log ye darkai likdenge, 
Hum na hawabaaj r bande Or na chalchalan k gande r na karne faddu dhande baat sda syani rakhange 
Are dc n mardi mohar chladya aslya ka yo jor 
Bnadya bairi ka jo mor vo bande khani rakhange, 
Konya rhva kise t darkai rakha bandukhadi n bharkai, r jo sedhya uski karkai kunba ghaani rakhange... 

R jo khele khel jo loga n ve aapa khtam bnadyange, thamne to reel bnai se appa film bnadyange, 
Janta dekh k hoja bauli, barsai jb pital ki goli kheli jagi khoon ki holi pistal taani rakhange, 
Are dc n mardi mohar chladya aslya ka yo jor 
Bnadya bairi ka jo mor vo bande khani rakhange, 
Konya rhva kise t darkai rakha bandukhadi n bharkai, r jo sedhya uski karkai kunba ghaani rakhange... 

Are lehrande asle dikhenge r dikhenge sareaam bhagat, 
Bdhabad goli chalengi r chalengi sareaam bhagat, 
Re wepon khas mangau mota naam yamraj ka dhardu jhota kadhle goli khoon ek lota mot ki rani rakhenge, 
Are dc n mardi mohar chladya aslya ka yo jor 

Bnadya bairi ka jo mor vo bande khani rakhange, 
Konya rhva kise t darkai rakha bandukhadi n bharkai, r jo sedhya uski karkai kunba ghaani rakhange...

snippet.title: Franklin Bought Spider-Man Kinder Joy for His SonвҖҰ рҹҳұрҹ•·пёҸ | GTA 5 Malayalam
snippet.description:
аҙ’аҙ°аөҒ аҙҡаөҶаҙұаҙҝаҙҜ аҙёаҙЁаөҚаҙӨаөӢаҙ·аҙӨаөҚаҙӨаҙҝаҙЁаҙҫаҙҜаҙҝ Franklin аҙӨаҙЁаөҚаҙұаөҶ аҙ®аҙ•аҙЁаҙҫаҙҜаҙҝ Spider-Man Kinder Joy аҙөаҙҫаҙҷаөҚаҙҷаҙҝвҖҰ рҹҳўрҹ•·пёҸ

snippet.title: Jab Talak (First Look) Shahid, Kriti, Rashmika | Pritam, Arijit Singh, Amitabh, Akasa | Cocktail 2
snippet.description:
WARNING вҡ пёҸ
This summer just got HOTTERрҹ”Ҙ

#JabTalak first look out now

#DanceLikeNoOnesWatching #Cocktail2Song #MaddockFilms 

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

рҹҺ§ Song Credits 

вһҹ Featuring: Shahid Kapoor, Kriti Sanon and Rashmika Mandanna
вһҹ Music : Universal Music India and Mad For Mussic 
вһҹ Singer : Arijit Singh, Akasa
вһҹ Composer: Pritam Chakraborty
вһҹ Lyrics : Amitabh Bhattacharya 

Dinesh Vijan & Luv Ranjan presents #Cocktail2вҖӢ, releasing in cinemas on 19th June, 2026

A Maddock Films & Luv Films Production

рҹҺ¬ Video Credits

вһҹ Cast: Shahid Kapoor,  Kriti Sanon, Rashmika Mandanna 
вһҹ Directed By: Homi Adajania 
вһҹ Produced By: Dinesh Vijan, Luv Ranjan & Ankur Garg
вһҹ Written By: Tarun Jain & Luv Ranjan
вһҹ Co-Producers: Sharada Karki Jalota, Pooja Prem Patheja

вһҹ Director of Photography: Santhana Krishnan Ravichandran
вһҹ Original Song and Background Score: Pritam Chakraborty   
вһҹ Costume Designer: Anaita Shroff Adajania 
вһҹ Director of Choreography: Vijay A. Ganguly
вһҹ Publicity Design: Himanshu  & Rahul Nanda (H-one)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Lyrics:


(Main Naachun tab talak
Tu bole jab talak) Г—4

Hai thoda besura par dil mein taal hai
Isko hum naachne se
tokein kab talak

(Main Naachun tab talak
Tu bole jab talak) Г—4

Nachchaan aaj main shukar mana ke
Sone yaar tonh nazrein mila ke
Mainu lor kise di koi na
saare jag di laaj bhula ke

Chal mood banake sufi
Thodi kar lein bewakoofi
Choolhe mein jaaye mitra
Duniya bhar ki masroofi

Pairon ko par lagne se rokeon kab talak

(Main Naachun tab talak
Tu bole jab talak) Г—4


ANTARA

Ve raanjha aag hai jitni idhar lagi
Tu bhi maan le dugni udhar lagi

Dono dil hi barabar jhulas gaye 
Pher.. jaan de kitni kidhar lagi

Ajj yaar de karke sadqe 
Maine pyale pyale gatke
Chal dekhein dil patri se
Aakhir kab tak na bhatke

Denge bhi ik dooje ko dhokhe kab talak..

(Main naachun tab talak
Tu bole jab talak) Г—4

Behki jawaniyaan jaise barood hain
Dekhein uthte nahin hain 
Shole kab talak

(Main naachun tab talak
Tu bole jab talak) Г—2

В© 2026 Universal Music India Pvt. Ltd., Under Exclusive License from Mad for Mussic

snippet.title: FALCON : Lakhi Ghuman | Jang Dhillon | Bhindder Burj | Latest Punjabi Songs 2026 | New Punjabi Song
snippet.description:
рҹ”Ҙ FALCON вҖ“ Lakhi Ghuman рҹ”Ҙ

Presenting the official track *вҖңFALCONвҖқ* by **Lakhi Ghuman**, a powerful song that brings high-energy vibes, bold lyrics, and a striking visual experience. This track captures attitude, ambition, and the fearless spirit of rising above all limitsвҖ”just like a falcon soaring in the sky. рҹҰ…

Singer and Composer: Lakhi Ghuman
Lyrics: Jang Dhillon
Music: Hammy Mangat
Mix and Master: Dense
Story, Screenplay and Director: Bhindder Burj
DOP: Jason Numberdar
Associate: Pal Mahla 
Chief AD: Gurie Madahar, Mani DC, Akash Sandhu
Art: Rajan Arts
Jib Operater: Munish
Costume: Rajat Manchanda
Editor: Cuts by Nav
Colorist: Fateh Sidhu

Label: LeafRecords 
Email: info@leafrecords.ca
Phone: +14034022596

рҹ‘ү DonвҖҷt forget to Like, Comment & Share
рҹ‘ү Subscribe for more latest Punjabi music

#Falcon #LakhiGhuman #LeafRecords #PunjabiMusic #NewSong #TrendingNow #MusicVideo


FALCON : Lakhi Ghuman | Jang Dhillon | Bhindder Burj | Latest Punjabi Songs 2026 | New Punjabi Songs 2026

#newpunjabisong #latestpunjabisongs 

Song Lyrics

Aayu russia ton fauj hona yudh jiddne
Khoon naal ghoreyan de pour bhijjne 
Vidhi da vidhaan kehda taalu kalnu 
Sees sidhe hongey guraan de vall nu 
Yodheya nu dhuro jadon haaka vajjiyan 
Tanka vangu aungiya range aan laddiya 
Degh tegh fateh da jaikaara gunjuga 
Sikh raaj dekheyo dbaara gunjuga 
Dj aan te santaan di speech chalugi 
Rani jinda chithiyan dbaare ghallugi 
Ladhi fer dulla jammu taahli naalda
Hoyu jathedaar phoola seyon akalli naalda 
Kamm laye jaangey kanoon sakht ton
Dand ditte jaangey akal takht ton
Kalyug vahno vaahni doud jauga 
Jaffi poun jagrawa nu lahore ayuga 
Hikk thok kehne a sure ayuga 
Dahdeyan dmalleyan da dor aauga........3x

Murh parne te pagga dihniyaa panjab nu 
Har dhoun jhukugi nishaan sahib nu 
Laike daang naal kohinoor taj aungey
Bahron chobra de bhre hoye jhaaj aungey 
Gutta te sarbh loh de karhe hongey 
Drawing room asle naal bhare hongey 
Raj laine jaane saddi koum kinga di 
Bordera te fouj hoyu nihang singha di 
Oye boond v ni dinde vicho sadde paaniya 
Har banda kanth karu panj baaniya 
Pairan thalle choudra jwani middugi 
Ghro ghri chulleya te degh rijjugi 
Jagngey chehre anna jor ayuga
Ik do ni khalsa crore auga 
Kyunki ajj de sme di vaddi lorh ayuga 
Dahdeyan dmalleyan da daur ayuga .....3x 

O do ghari dekh jihnu sher darje 
Honey kadd kirdaar naluye de argey 
Hun jadon hoyi honi jang end di 
Parhke turangey vaar banda singh di 
Jis vele yudh da biggal gajj geya 
Os wele dsangey ki time vajgeya
Hr maa da putt urha joorha sahmbuga 
Kesri te rang neela goorha sambhuga 
Aayu oho time jehda mitt hunda si 
Goreya de tera sadda ik hunda si 
Raj hona sadda saddey rule hongey 
Sikhi de sidhanta te school hongey 
Kdo kiwe hoya si birth dsangey 
Asal akali de arth dsangey 
Murhpey ghara nu jadon putt morhe te 
Din charey kharkhra firu ghorey te 
.........

O nwe munde jadon kissa kaav parhgey 
Jamngey fer jagge jeoney varge
Raggi dhadhi jadon sikh raj goungey 
Charhtey de potrey jhe yaad aungey 
Kisse parsang lohri maghi sunage 
Deya singh dilbar dhadi sunage 
Sukhe jinde yodheya de mele laawage 
Bhai nirmal choley ali jaggo gawangey 
Raja oh nikamma jihda raj na rawe
Kaum kaahdi jihda raaj bhaag na rwe
Aisa jang dhillon likhi ke anand a jwe 
Sunke sareero looyi kandeya jwe 
Hor kinne likhngey tenu dekhke
Rakh tu purhainiya kalam ret ke 
Sach jadon likhe ithihaas hongey 
Fer asal azadi de ehsaas hongey 
Pata lagju smey nu koohni morh ayuga 
Dekhi hathi ali turya oh tor ayuga 
Jehda khalsa a raj o pure ayuga ......

snippet.title: Aa Bhi Ja Aa Bhi Ja (Music Video) Lucky Ali, Sunidhi Chauhan | Sur The Melody Of Life
snippet.description:
"Aa Bhi Ja, Aa Bhi Ja" is a hauntingly beautiful soulful ballad from the 2002 film Sur: The Melody of Life. Composed by M.M. Keeravani and written by Nida Fazli, the song is an evocative plea for a lost or distant love, brought to life by the powerful and emotive vocals of Lucky Ali and Sunidhi Chauhan.

Credits: 
Singer: Lucky Ali, Sunidhi Chauhan
Music: M.M. Kareem 
Lyrics: Nida Fazli
Movie: Sur The Melody Of Life
Starring: Lucky Ali, Gauri Karnik
Director: Tanuja Chandra
Producer: Fish Eye Network
Label: Universal Music India

Lyrics:

Aa Bhi Jaa, Aa Bhi Jaa, Ae Subaah Aa Bhi Jaa...
Aa Bhi Jaa, Aa Bhi Jaa, Ae Subaah Aa Bhi Jaa...
Raat Ko Kar Vida, Dilruba Aa Bhi Jaa ...
 
Aa Bhi Jaa, Aa Bhi Jaa, Ae Subaah Aa Bhi Jaa...
Aa Bhi Jaa, Aa Bhi Jaa, Ae Subaah Aa Bhi Jaa...
 
Raat Ko Kar Vida, Dilruba Aa Bhi Jaa ...
 
Aa Bhi Jaa, Aa Bhi Jaa, Ae Subaah Aa Bhi Jaa
Mere, Mere Dil Ke Paagalpan Ki Oh Seema Kya Hai
Yun To Tu Hai Meri, Chhaaya Tujh Mein, Ho, Tera Kya Hai
Main Hoon Gagan Tu Hai Zameen, Adhoori Si Mere Bina
Raat Ko Kar Vida, Dilruba Aa Bhi Jaa
 
Aa Bhi Jaa, Aa Bhi Jaa, Ae Subaah Aa Bhi Jaa...
Aa Bhi Jaa, Aa Bhi Jaa, Ae Subaah Aa Bhi Jaa...
 
Dekhoon Chaahe Jisko, Kuch Kuch Tujhsa Dikhta Kyon Hai
Jaano, Jaano Na Main, Tera Mera Rishta Kyon Hai
Kaise Kahoon Kitna Bechain Hai Dil Mera Tere Bina
Raat Ko Kar Vida, Dilruba Aa Bhi Jaa ...
 
Aa Bhi Jaa, Aa Bhi Jaa, Ae Subaah Aa Bhi Jaa...
Aa Bhi Jaa, Aa Bhi Jaa, Ae Subaah Aa Bhi Jaa...

(c) Universal Music India

Music video by Lucky Ali, Sunidhi Chauhan performing Aa Bhi Ja Aa Bhi Ja (From "Sur (The Melody Of Life)" / Lyric Video).В© 2026 Universal Music India Pvt. Ltd.

High-quality 8K visuals рҹ“ә

Evergreen hit that still trends рҹ”Ҙ

Lyrics :

Vadde vadde velly pa ke ghume jeba ch
Janda na dhayan meriyan panjeba ch
Vadde vadde velly pa ke ghume jeba ch
Janda na dhayan meriyan panjeba ch
Kihda kihda aithe das muh fad la
Hoge sharyam tere shehar charche
Bebe baapu puchde munde di degree ki dsa 8 chalde tere te parche
Tu yaaran piche firda pavonda chabiyan 26 saal di kuwari baithi tere kar ke
Samjhi na bholi mainu sab pta aa

аҰ®а§ҮаҰІ'аҰЎа§Җ аҰЎаҰҝаҰңаҰҫаҰҮаҰЁ                      : аҰӯаҰҰа§Қа§°аҰ•аҰҫаҰЁа§ҚаҰӨ аҰҰаҰҫаҰё

snippet.title: Munda Sardar | Gurnam Bhullar | New Punjabi Song 2026 | Khushkhabri | latest punjabi song 2026 |
snippet.description:
Crown Records & Vikram Puwar in Association With Zoria Production and Panj Tara Motion Pictures Presents: 

рҹҺ¶ Munda Sardar вҖ“ A powerful and energetic track from the upcoming Punjabi film Khushkhabri!

Feel the swag, attitude, and Punjabi vibe with the soulful voice of Gurnam Bhullar. This song perfectly captures the spirit of a true Sardar with high-energy beats and catchy lyrics.

вңЁ Credits:
рҹҺӨ Singer: Gurnam Bhullar
рҹҺ¬ Film: Khushkhabri
вңҚпёҸ Lyrics: Happy Raikoti
рҹҺө Music: Avvy Sra

рҹ’Ҙ Get ready to vibe with this latest Punjabi track and experience the energy of Munda Sardar!

рҹ‘ү Like, Share & Comment your favorite part
рҹ”” Subscribe for more songs from Khushkhabri

#MundaSardar #GurnamBhullar #Khushkhabri #PunjabiSongs #NewPunjabiSong #PunjabiMusic #pollywood 

рҹҺ¬ Featuring an incredible cast:
Binnu Dhillon, Payal Rajput, Nirmal Rishi, Harby Sangha, Deedar Gill, Honey Mattu, Jaggi Dhuri, Abbey Singh, Gurpartap Kang, Gurmeet Sajan, Gurdial Singh, Swaraj Sandhu, Arman Singh & Kulrak Singh

рҹҺҘ Film Credits:
Directed by : Laddi Ghuman
Produced by : Gurdeep Singh, Jatinder Singh & Harpreet Singh
Film Distributed by : Panaroma Studio's & Anand Pandit Motion Pictures
Project by : Sharan Pataria
Music Released by : Crown Records Private Limited and Belive Digital
Music Promoted by : Urban Media

snippet.title: Kotyach Saaj | аӨ•аҘӢаӨҹаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨҡаӨӮ аӨёаӨҫаӨң | Adarsh Shinde | Hrushi B | VijayaAnandMusic
snippet.description:
аӨ•аҘҚаӨ°аӨҫаӨӮаӨӨаҘҖаӨҡаӨҫ аӨөаӨҫаӨ°аӨёаӨҫ, аӨ¶аӨҝаӨӮаӨҰаҘҮаӨ¶аӨҫаӨ№аҘҖаӨҡаӨҫ аӨҶаӨөаӨҫаӨң
вҖҳаӨ•аҘӢаӨҹаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨҡаӨӮ аӨёаӨҫаӨңвҖҷ рҹ‘‘

A heartfelt tribute filled with pride and deep emotion, вҖңKotyach SaajвҖқ pays homage to the eternal legacy of Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar рҹ’ҷ
Brought to life with soul-stirring vocals by Adarsh Shinde and beautifully crafted by
 Hrushi B.

VijayaAnandMusic Presents 
аӨ•аҘӢаӨҹаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨҡаӨӮ аӨёаӨҫаӨң вҖңKotyach SaajвҖқ

Singer - Adarsh Shinde
Lyrics - Hrushi B                       
Music - Hrushi B
Recorded by  - Avadhoot Wadkar @Ajivasan Studio
Chorus Recorded by - Aayush @ Dawn Studioz

аӨӨаҘӢ аӨҶаӨҲаӨҸ аӨҶаӨң аӨӘаӨҫаӨөаӨЁ аӨ№аҘғаӨҰаӨҜ аӨёаҘҮ аӨҮаӨё аӨӯаӨңаӨЁ аӨҰаҘҚаӨөаӨҫаӨ°аӨҫ аӨңаҘӢ аӨ®аӨҫаӨӮаӨ—аӨЁаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ аӨ®аӨҫаӨӮаӨ— аӨІаҘҖаӨңаӨҝаӨҸаҘӨ

radha hit bhajan mohe mor banaiyo radha, mohe mor banaiyo to banaiyo vrindavan ko, peaceful radha krishna bhajan, mohe mor banaiyo radha, mohe mor banaiyo bhajan, farmani naaz mohe mor bhanaiyo radha, аӨ®аҘӢаӨ№аҘҮ аӨ®аҘӢаӨ° аӨ¬аӨЁаӨҮаӨҜаҘҚаӨҜаҘӢ аӨ°аӨҫаӨ§аӨҫ, аӨ®аҘӢаӨ№аҘҮ аӨ®аҘӢаӨ° аӨ¬аӨЁаӨҫаӨҮаӨҜаҘҚаӨҜаҘӢ аӨ°аӨҫаӨ§аӨҫ, radha krishna bhajan, radha krishna bhajan 2026, mohe mor banaiyo farmani naaz, mohe mor banaiyo to banaiyo, aagle janam radha morni banaiyo, mohe mor banaiyo, popul;er bhajan mohe mor, aagle janam radha sadhu banaiyo, aagle janam radha bander banaiyo, 

Lose yourself in the sacred lanes of Vrindavan with this soulful rendition: "Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha." This Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan captures the deep desire of a devotee to become a peacock in the gardens of Nidhivan, just to be close to Radha Rani and Krishna.

аӨ®аҘӢаӨ№аҘҮ аӨ®аҘӢаӨ° аӨ¬аӨЁаӨҮаӨҜаҘҚаӨҜаҘӢ аӨ°аӨҫаӨ§аӨҫ - аӨөаҘғаӨӮаӨҰаӨҫаӨөаӨЁ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨҮаӨё аӨӘаӨҫаӨөаӨЁ аӨ§аҘҒаӨЁ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ–аҘӢ аӨңаӨҫаӨҸаӨҒаҘӨ  Bhakti аӨҶаӨӘаӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаӨҝаӨҸ аӨІаҘҮаӨ•аӨ° аӨҶаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ аӨ¶аҘҚаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ°аӨҫаӨ§аӨҫ-аӨ•аҘғаӨ·аҘҚаӨЈ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ®аӨ№аӨҝаӨ®аӨҫ аӨ•аӨҫ аӨҸаӨ• аӨҗаӨёаӨҫ аӨӯаӨңаӨЁ аӨңаҘӢ аӨҶаӨӘаӨ•аҘҮ аӨ№аҘғаӨҰаӨҜ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨ¶аӨҫаӨӮаӨӨаӨҝ аӨ”аӨ° аӨҶаӨЁаӨӮаӨҰ аӨёаҘҮ аӨӯаӨ° аӨҰаҘҮаӨ—аӨҫаҘӨ

аӨҜаӨ№ аӨ®аӨ§аҘҒаӨ° аӨ”аӨ° аӨӯаӨҫаӨөаӨӘаҘӮаӨ°аҘҚаӨЈ Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan аӨ¬аҘҚаӨ°аӨң аӨ•аҘҖ аӨӘаӨҫаӨөаӨЁ аӨӯаӨҫаӨөаӨЁаӨҫ аӨ”аӨ° аӨ°аӨҫаӨ§аӨҫ-аӨ•аҘғаӨ·аҘҚаӨЈ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨҰаӨҝаӨөаҘҚаӨҜ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аҘҮаӨ® аӨ•аҘӢ аӨёаӨ®аӨ°аҘҚаӨӘаӨҝаӨӨ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ
вҖңаӨ®аҘӢаӨ№аҘҮ аӨ®аҘӢаӨ° аӨ¬аӨЁаӨҮаӨҜаҘҚаӨҜаҘӢ аӨ°аӨҫаӨ§аӨҫаӨ…аӨӘаӨЁаҘҮ аӨөаҘғаӨӮаӨҰаӨҫаӨөаӨЁ аӨ•аҘӢвҖқ вҖ“ аӨҜаӨ№ аӨӘаӨӮаӨ•аҘҚаӨӨаӨҝ аӨӯаӨ•аҘҚаӨӨ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨүаӨё аӨөаӨҝаӨЁаӨ®аҘҚаӨ° аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨҫаӨ°аҘҚаӨҘаӨЁаӨҫ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨҰаӨ°аҘҚаӨ¶аӨҫаӨӨаҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲ, аӨңаӨ№аӨҫаӨҒ аӨөаӨ№ аӨ¬аҘҚаӨ°аӨңаӨ§аӨҫаӨ® аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ®аҘӢаӨ° аӨ¬аӨЁаӨ•аӨ° аӨӯаҘҖ аӨ°аӨҫаӨ§аӨҫ-аӨ•аҘғаӨ·аҘҚаӨЈ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨҡаӨ°аӨЈаҘӢаӨӮ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ°аӨ№аӨЁаӨҫ аӨҡаӨҫаӨ№аӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ

аӨҜаӨ№ аӨӯаӨңаӨЁ аӨ§аҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨЁ, аӨңаӨӘ, аӨёаҘҒаӨ¬аӨ№-аӨ¶аӨҫаӨ® аӨ•аҘҖ аӨӘаҘӮаӨңаӨҫ, аӨөаҘғаӨӮаӨҰаӨҫаӨөаӨЁ аӨӯаӨ•аҘҚаӨӨаӨҝ, аӨ•аҘҖаӨ°аҘҚаӨӨаӨЁ аӨ”аӨ° аӨ®аӨЁ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ¶аӨҫаӨӮаӨӨаӨҝ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаӨҝаӨҸ аӨ…аӨӨаҘҚаӨҜаӨӮаӨӨ аӨүаӨӘаӨҜаҘҒаӨ•аҘҚаӨӨ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ аӨҮаӨёаӨ•аҘҖ аӨ¶аӨҫаӨӮаӨӨ аӨ§аҘҒаӨЁ аӨ”аӨ° аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аҘҮаӨ®аӨӘаҘӮаӨ°аҘҚаӨЈ аӨ¶аӨ¬аҘҚаӨҰ аӨҶаӨӨаҘҚаӨ®аӨҫ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨёаҘҒаӨ•аҘӮаӨЁ аӨҰаҘҮаӨӨаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮ аӨ”аӨ° аӨ®аӨЁ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨөаҘғаӨӮаӨҰаӨҫаӨөаӨЁ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ—аӨІаӨҝаӨҜаҘӢаӨӮ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨІаҘҮ аӨңаӨҫаӨӨаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮаҘӨ

Listen to the divine Govinda Namalu With Telugu Lyrics, a powerful devotional chant dedicated to Lord Venkateswara Swamy (Balaji). Chanting Govinda Namalu and Om Namo Venkatesaya brings peace, prosperity, and divine blessings into your life. This sacred Venkateswara Swamy Devotional Song is highly beneficial for daily prayer, meditation, and spiritual growth.

In this video, you can experience the soulful recitation of Sri Govinda Namalu Telugu with clear lyrics, making it easy to follow and chant along. Listening to these powerful Tirumala Balaji Bhakti Songs helps remove negativity, reduce stress, and attract success and positivity.

snippet.title: ITNA MUJHE BATA DO: Mukesh Mahadev, Mann Taneja | Hussain Mansuri | New Hindi Song 2026 | Sad Song
snippet.description:
Voila Digi Private Limited presents 'Itna Mujhe Bata Do', sung by Mukesh Mahadev, composed by Mann Taneja and written by Gaurav Pandey. Mukesh Mahadev was discovered by Hussain Mansuri, and today, he's given his vocals for his beautiful sad song. This song's a testament that even in the darkest corners, talent always shines. #MukeshMahadev #HussainMansuri

A very special thanks to Hussain Mansuri.

This song is produced by Girish Jain & Vinit Jain (Voila Digi Private Limited).

snippet.title: Franklin Exposed A New Secret Garage Under His House in GTA 5 !
snippet.description:
#gta5shinchan #franklin #eaglegaming
#gta5 #gta5roleplay #gametherapist #kaztrogaming #eaglegaming #gta5malayalam  

GTA 5: Franklin Robbed Mini Rc Car For Shinchan

VIDEO :- 12

Instagram :    / christ_yt_

Discord link :-    / discord  

Whatsapp group link :- https://chat.whatsapp.com/ELZM1yMH19I...

 


рҹҺ®рқ‘®рқ‘Ёрқ‘ҙрқ‘°рқ‘өрқ‘® рқ‘әрқ‘¬рқ‘»рқ‘јрқ‘·

в–«пёҸбҙҳКҖбҙҸбҙ„бҙҮssбҙҸКҖ          :- ЙӘЙҙбҙӣбҙҮКҹ бҙ„бҙҸКҖбҙҮ ГҢрқҹ» рқҹ·рқҹ·рқҹәрқҹ¶рқҹ¶Т“ рқҹјбҙ„бҙҸКҖбҙҮ рқҹ·рқҹё бҙӣКңКҖбҙҮбҙҖбҙ… бҙҳКҖбҙҸбҙ„бҙҮssбҙҸКҖ

в–«пёҸЙўКҖбҙҖбҙҳКңЙӘбҙ„s бҙ„бҙҖКҖбҙ…   :- бҙҚsЙӘ ЙўбҙҮТ“бҙҸКҖбҙ„бҙҮ Йўбҙӣx рқҹ·рқҹјрқҹ»рқҹ¶ бҙ бҙҮЙҙбҙӣбҙңs xs бҙҸбҙ„ бҙҮбҙ…ЙӘбҙӣЙӘбҙҸЙҙ рқҹәЙўКҷ бҙ…бҙ…КҖрқҹ» ЙўКҖбҙҖбҙҳКңЙӘбҙ„s бҙ„бҙҖКҖбҙ…

в–«пёҸssбҙ…                          :- бҙҖбҙ„бҙҮКҖ Т“бҙҖрқҹ·рқҹ¶рқҹ¶ рқҹ»рқҹ·рқҹёЙўКҷ бҙҚ.рқҹё Йҙбҙ бҙҚбҙҮ ssбҙ…

в–«пёҸбҙҚбҙҸбҙӣКңбҙҮКҖКҷбҙҸбҙҖКҖбҙ…    :- ЙўЙӘЙўбҙҖКҷКҸбҙӣбҙҮ Кҷрқҹ»рқҹјрқҹ¶бҙҚ бҙ…sрқҹ№Кң бҙҚбҙҸбҙӣКңбҙҮКҖКҷбҙҸбҙҖКҖбҙ…

в–«пёҸКҖбҙҖбҙҚ                         :- бҙ„бҙҸКҖsбҙҖЙӘКҖ бҙ бҙҮЙҙЙўбҙҮбҙҖЙҙбҙ„бҙҮ рқҹ·рқҹјЙўКҷ рқҹ№рқҹ¶рқҹ¶рқҹ¶бҙҚКңбҙў бҙ…бҙ…КҖрқҹә

в–«пёҸsбҙӣбҙҸКҖбҙҖЙўбҙҮ                :- sбҙҮбҙҖЙўбҙҖбҙӣбҙҮ КҷбҙҖКҖКҖбҙҖбҙ„бҙңбҙ…бҙҖ рқҹ·бҙӣКҷ Кңбҙ…бҙ…

в–«пёҸбҙҳбҙҸбҙЎбҙҮКҖ sбҙңбҙҳбҙҳКҹКҸ     :- бҙ„бҙҸбҙҸКҹбҙҮКҖ бҙҚбҙҖsбҙӣбҙҮКҖ бҙҚбҙЎбҙҮ рқҹ»рқҹ»рқҹ¶бҙЎ рқҹҫрқҹ¶ бҙҳКҹбҙңs КҷКҖбҙҸЙҙбҙўбҙҮ бҙ„бҙҮКҖбҙӣЙӘТ“ЙӘбҙҮбҙ… бҙҳбҙҸбҙЎбҙҮКҖ sбҙңбҙҳбҙҳКҹКҸ

в–«пёҸбҙ„бҙҖКҷЙӘЙҙбҙҮбҙӣ                  :- Т“бҙҸxЙӘЙҙ бҙҳКҹбҙҖбҙӣЙӘЙҙбҙңбҙҚ КҖЙўКҷ бҙ„бҙҖКҷЙӘЙҙбҙҮбҙӣ

в–«пёҸбҙҚбҙҸЙҙЙӘбҙӣбҙҸКҖ                 :- sбҙҖбҙҚsбҙңЙҙЙў рқҹёрқҹәЙӘЙҙбҙ„Кң рқҹҪрқҹ»Кңбҙў ЙӘбҙҳs КҹбҙҮбҙ… бҙҚбҙҸЙҙЙӘбҙӣбҙҸКҖ

в–«пёҸбҙӢбҙҮКҸКҷбҙҸбҙҖКҖбҙ… & рҹҗӯ    :- бҙўбҙҮКҷКҖбҙҸЙҙЙӘбҙ„s бҙӣКҖбҙҖЙҙsТ“бҙҸКҖбҙҚбҙҮКҖ КҖЙўКҷ бҙӢбҙҮКҸКҷбҙҸбҙҖКҖбҙ… бҙҖЙҙбҙ… бҙҚбҙҸбҙңsбҙҮ рҹҗӯ бҙ„бҙҸбҙҚКҷбҙҸ

в–«пёҸбҙңбҙҳs                           :- Т“бҙҸxЙӘЙҙ Т“бҙҳs рқҹ·рқҹ¶рқҹ¶рқҹ¶бҙ бҙҖ бҙңбҙҳs

                   THANK YOU ALL

в–«пёҸsбҙӣбҙҸКҖбҙҖЙўбҙҮ                :- sбҙҮбҙҖЙўбҙҖбҙӣбҙҮ КҷбҙҖКҖКҖбҙҖбҙ„бҙңбҙ…бҙҖ рқҹ·бҙӣКҷ Кңбҙ…бҙ…

в–«пёҸбҙҳбҙҸбҙЎбҙҮКҖ sбҙңбҙҳбҙҳКҹКҸ     :- бҙ„бҙҸбҙҸКҹбҙҮКҖ бҙҚбҙҖsбҙӣбҙҮКҖ бҙҚбҙЎбҙҮ рқҹ»рқҹ»рқҹ¶бҙЎ рқҹҫрқҹ¶ бҙҳКҹбҙңs КҷКҖбҙҸЙҙбҙўбҙҮ бҙ„бҙҮКҖбҙӣЙӘТ“ЙӘбҙҮбҙ… бҙҳбҙҸбҙЎбҙҮКҖ sбҙңбҙҳбҙҳКҹКҸ

в–«пёҸбҙ„бҙҖКҷЙӘЙҙбҙҮбҙӣ                  :- Т“бҙҸxЙӘЙҙ бҙҳКҹбҙҖбҙӣЙӘЙҙбҙңбҙҚ КҖЙўКҷ бҙ„бҙҖКҷЙӘЙҙбҙҮбҙӣ

в–«пёҸбҙҚбҙҸЙҙЙӘбҙӣбҙҸКҖ                 :- sбҙҖбҙҚsбҙңЙҙЙў рқҹёрқҹәЙӘЙҙбҙ„Кң рқҹҪрқҹ»Кңбҙў ЙӘбҙҳs КҹбҙҮбҙ… бҙҚбҙҸЙҙЙӘбҙӣбҙҸКҖ

в–«пёҸбҙӢбҙҮКҸКҷбҙҸбҙҖКҖбҙ… & рҹҗӯ    :- бҙўбҙҮКҷКҖбҙҸЙҙЙӘбҙ„s бҙӣКҖбҙҖЙҙsТ“бҙҸКҖбҙҚбҙҮКҖ КҖЙўКҷ бҙӢбҙҮКҸКҷбҙҸбҙҖКҖбҙ… бҙҖЙҙбҙ… бҙҚбҙҸбҙңsбҙҮ рҹҗӯ бҙ„бҙҸбҙҚКҷбҙҸ

в–«пёҸбҙңбҙҳs                           :- Т“бҙҸxЙӘЙҙ Т“бҙҳs рқҹ·рқҹ¶рқҹ¶рқҹ¶бҙ бҙҖ бҙңбҙҳs

                   THANK YOU ALL

snippet.title: аӨ°аӨөаӨҝаӨөаӨҫаӨ° аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨҫаӨӨаӨғ аӨ•аӨҫаӨІ аӨёаҘӮаӨ°аҘҚаӨҜ аӨҰаҘҮаӨө аӨҡаӨҫаӨІаҘҖаӨёаӨҫ Surya Chalisa аӨёаҘҒаӨЁаӨЁаҘҮ аӨёаҘҮ аӨёаӨӯаҘҖ аӨ®аӨЁаҘӢаӨ•аӨҫаӨ®аӨЁаӨҫаӨҸаӨӮ аӨӘаҘӮаӨ°аҘҚаӨЈ аӨ№аҘӢаӨӨаҘҖаӨӮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮ

аӨ°аӨөаӨҝаӨөаӨҫаӨ° аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨҫаӨӨаӨғ аӨ•аӨҫаӨІ аӨёаҘӮаӨ°аҘҚаӨҜ аӨҰаҘҮаӨө аӨҡаӨҫаӨІаҘҖаӨёаӨҫ Surya Chalisa аӨёаҘҒаӨЁаӨЁаҘҮ аӨёаҘҮ аӨёаӨӯаҘҖ аӨ®аӨЁаҘӢаӨ•аӨҫаӨ®аӨЁаӨҫаӨҸаӨӮ аӨӘаҘӮаӨ°аҘҚаӨЈ аӨ№аҘӢаӨӨаҘҖаӨӮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮ

Singer - Chetna Shukla & Anjali Jain 
Lyrics - Traditional 
Label - Bhakti Classic
Produced by - Focus Media Hub 

Start your day with " Bhakti Classic " to bring peace to your soul. 
рҹҢё аӨ®аӨЁ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ¶аӨҫаӨӮаӨӨаӨҝ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаӨҝаӨҸ " Bhakti Classic  
" аӨҜаҘӮаӨҹаҘҚаӨҜаҘӮаӨ¬ аӨҡаҘҲаӨЁаӨІ аӨӘаӨ° аӨӯаӨңаӨЁ аӨӯаӨ•аҘҚаӨӨаӨҝ аӨ—аҘҖаӨӨ аӨ”аӨ° аӨҶаӨ°аӨӨаҘҖ ,аӨҡаӨҫаӨІаҘҖаӨёаӨҫ аӨө аӨ®аӨӮаӨӨаҘҚаӨ° аӨёаҘҒаӨЁаҘҮ 
рҹҢё аӨҶаӨң аӨ№аҘҖ аӨ№аӨ®аӨҫаӨ°аҘҮ аӨҡаҘҲаӨЁаӨІ аӨ•аҘӢ SUBSCRIBE аӨ•аӨ°аҘҮ аӨө аӨ…аӨЁаҘҚаӨҜ аӨӯаӨ•аҘҚаӨӨаҘӢаӨӮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨёаӨҫаӨҘ аӨөаҘҖаӨЎаӨҝаӨҜаҘӢ аӨ•аҘӢ Share аӨ•аӨ°аҘҮ аӨө Like аӨ•аӨ°аӨЁаӨҫ аӨЁ аӨӯаҘӮаӨІаҘҮаӨӮ|

Directed by K. Balachander, the film stars Rahman, Geetha, Sithara, Sowcar Janaki, and Jayachitra.

snippet.title: аӨ®аҘӢаӨ№аҘҮ аӨ®аҘӢаӨ° аӨ¬аӨЁаӨҮаӨҜаҘҚаӨҜаҘӢ аӨ°аӨҫаӨ§аӨҫ | Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha Apne Vrindavan Ko | Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan
snippet.description:
#radhabhajan #krishnabhajan #radhakrishna
аӨ®аҘӢаӨ№аҘҮ аӨ®аҘӢаӨ° аӨ¬аӨЁаӨҮаӨҜаҘҚаӨҜаҘӢ аӨ°аӨҫаӨ§аӨҫ | Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha Apne Vrindavan Ko | Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan

 аӨ®аҘӢаӨ№аҘҮ аӨ®аҘӢаӨ° аӨ¬аӨЁаӨҮаӨҜаҘҚаӨҜаҘӢ аӨ°аӨҫаӨ§аӨҫ | Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha Apne Vrindavan Ko | Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan
 
Lose yourself in the sacred lanes of Vrindavan with this soulful rendition: "Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha." This Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan captures the deep desire of a devotee to become a peacock in the gardens of Nidhivan, just to be close to Radha Rani and Krishna.

аӨ®аҘӢаӨ№аҘҮ аӨ®аҘӢаӨ° аӨ¬аӨЁаӨҮаӨҜаҘҚаӨҜаҘӢ аӨ°аӨҫаӨ§аӨҫ - аӨөаҘғаӨӮаӨҰаӨҫаӨөаӨЁ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨҮаӨё аӨӘаӨҫаӨөаӨЁ аӨ§аҘҒаӨЁ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ–аҘӢ аӨңаӨҫаӨҸаӨҒаҘӨ Bajao Bhakti аӨҶаӨӘаӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаӨҝаӨҸ аӨІаҘҮаӨ•аӨ° аӨҶаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ аӨ¶аҘҚаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ°аӨҫаӨ§аӨҫ-аӨ•аҘғаӨ·аҘҚаӨЈ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ®аӨ№аӨҝаӨ®аӨҫ аӨ•аӨҫ аӨҸаӨ• аӨҗаӨёаӨҫ аӨӯаӨңаӨЁ аӨңаҘӢ аӨҶаӨӘаӨ•аҘҮ аӨ№аҘғаӨҰаӨҜ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨ¶аӨҫаӨӮаӨӨаӨҝ аӨ”аӨ° аӨҶаӨЁаӨӮаӨҰ аӨёаҘҮ аӨӯаӨ° аӨҰаҘҮаӨ—аӨҫаҘӨ

аӨҜаӨ№ аӨӯаӨңаӨЁ аӨ§аҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨЁ, аӨңаӨӘ, аӨёаҘҒаӨ¬аӨ№-аӨ¶аӨҫаӨ® аӨ•аҘҖ аӨӘаҘӮаӨңаӨҫ, аӨөаҘғаӨӮаӨҰаӨҫаӨөаӨЁ аӨӯаӨ•аҘҚаӨӨаӨҝ, аӨ•аҘҖаӨ°аҘҚаӨӨаӨЁ аӨ”аӨ° аӨ®аӨЁ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ¶аӨҫаӨӮаӨӨаӨҝ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаӨҝаӨҸ аӨ…аӨӨаҘҚаӨҜаӨӮаӨӨ аӨүаӨӘаӨҜаҘҒаӨ•аҘҚаӨӨ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ аӨҮаӨёаӨ•аҘҖ аӨ¶аӨҫаӨӮаӨӨ аӨ§аҘҒаӨЁ аӨ”аӨ° аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аҘҮаӨ®аӨӘаҘӮаӨ°аҘҚаӨЈ аӨ¶аӨ¬аҘҚаӨҰ аӨҶаӨӨаҘҚаӨ®аӨҫ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨёаҘҒаӨ•аҘӮаӨЁ аӨҰаҘҮаӨӨаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮ аӨ”аӨ° аӨ®аӨЁ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨөаҘғаӨӮаӨҰаӨҫаӨөаӨЁ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ—аӨІаӨҝаӨҜаҘӢаӨӮ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨІаҘҮ аӨңаӨҫаӨӨаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮаҘӨ

snippet.title: The BGIS Champions Unfiltered: Team Soul's Secret to Victory: The W Club Ep. 01
snippet.description:
The Grind. The Glory. The W.
Welcome to the premiere episode of The W Club, where we sit down with the biggest names in gaming and sports to uncover the mindset behind the wins. To kick things off, IвҖҷm joined by the reigning BGIS Champions- Team Soul.
In this episode, weвҖҷre going beyond the scoreboard. We dive deep into the teamвҖҷs journey to the top, the high-pressure moments that defined their championship run, and what it really takes to stay at the pinnacle of Indian Esports. From internal team dynamics to the strategies that outclassed the competition, no topic is off-limits.
In this episode:
* The Road to BGIS: How they prepared for the biggest stage in Indian gaming.
* Team Dynamics: The chemistry between Nakul, Goblin, Joker, Legit, Thunder, and Coach Ayogi.
* Soul-Ful Rapid Fire: Quick questions, spicy answers, and some behind-the-scenes secrets.
Whether youвҖҷre an aspiring pro player or a die-hard Soul fan, this is the blueprint for excellence.
Subscribe to join the club and never miss an episode.
make sure to follow the boys on youtube as well!
